reasoning: The question asks if Florida will enact legislation expanding voter citizenship verification requirements before July 1, 2025. Search results confirm that the relevant bills proposed during the 2025 legislative session (such as HB 831 and HB 1381) failed to advance before the session concluded in May 2025. The issue was revisited the following year, and Governor DeSantis ultimately signed a comprehensive proof-of-citizenship voting bill (a "SAVE Act replica") into law on April 1, 2026. Therefore, no such legislation was enacted prior to the July 1, 2025 deadline.
